name: NuSTEM
description: NuSTEM is an advanced formula for healthy aging using CyanthOx™ Tibetan Seaberry Concentrate & Ioniplex® Ionic Minerals. It combines two clinically studied ingredients to support stem cell release, cellular repair, and antioxidant protection for healthy aging.
benefits: Increases the number of circulating stem cells
Accelerates tissue repair at cellular level
Supports physical performance at all levels
Powerful antioxidant – protects against oxidative damage

dosage.therapeutic: 1 sachet daily mixed in 150ml room temperature water
dosage.general: Mix 1 sachet into 150ml of room temperature water

ingredients: Mixed berries juice powder (blackberry juice, raspberry juice, blueberry juice)
who_can_consume: Adults seeking healthy aging support, cellular repair, and antioxidant protection.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, or have underlying health conditions.

qa.question: What is CyanthOx™ and how does it support stem cells?
qa.answer: CyanthOx™ is extracted from Tibetan Plateau sea buckthorn with a concentration ratio of 300kg sea buckthorn produces 1kg CyanthOx™. It is clinically tested to increase circulating stem cells by nearly 40% and may stimulate 3 different types of stem cells.

qa.question: What makes Ioniplex® special?
qa.answer: Ioniplex® is a patented fulvic ionic mineral complex containing up to 65 essential macro and trace minerals. It is clinically shown to improve mitochondrial metabolism, may reduce AGEs by up to 50%, and has been proven to improve skin texture (33%), hair appearance (14%), and nail growth (142%).
